title: Celestial
description: A ritual-based progression mod built on top of Ad Astra
body:
# Celestial

Celestial is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that introduces a central ritual system, a new form of cosmic progression, and highly visual event-driven moments into the game.

At the core of the mod lies the ritual built around the Stellar Pedestals.
When the correct items are placed in the right configuration, the ritual can be activated, leading to a unique and highly staged completion sequence.

This includes custom particle effects, a progression system, and a strong visual payoff designed to make each ritual feel meaningful and powerful.

The ritual system can also be controlled server-side via admin commands, making it especially useful for modpacks, events, or testing environments.




#  Features
- Custom ritual system using Stellar Pedestals
- Cosmic-themed progression design
- Admin-only commands to control ritual behavior
- Manually triggerable title overlay via command
- Custom particle effects and visual ritual sequences
- Advancement/progression integration
- Designed for Fabric 1.20.1
⚙️ Commands

```
/celestial ritual → Displays current ritual status
```


```
/celestial ritual true → Enables the ritual
```


```
/celestial ritual false → Disables the ritual
```


```
/celestial cr_title → Triggers the large title overlay manually
```

## 📌 Notes
Developed for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1
May require additional dependencies depending on your modpack setup
Ritual behavior and visuals are fully integrated into the Celestial design and can be controlled server-side

## 🌠 Vision

Celestial is designed to feel like a small but meaningful expansion —
focused on atmosphere, progression, and presentation rather than overwhelming complexity.

If you're looking for a mod that adds a distinct, cinematic system to your world, Celestial is built exactly for that purpose.
